dashboard.title: Professional breeding cockpit
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your kennel, reproduction, health records, sales and communication from one structured interface.

dashboard.description: Overview of key indicators, alerts and priority actions.

dogs.description: Manage dog records, statuses, administrative data and individual tracking.

soins.description: Centralize care, treatments, vaccines and health events.

reminders.description: Track critical deadlines: vaccines, parasite control, documents and checks.

weights.description: Track puppy growth with weight history and stagnation alerts.

reproduction.description: Structure breeding strategy and selection decisions.

heats.description: Monitor heat cycles, key dates and mating forecasts.

matings.description: Record matings, breeding stock, dates and observations.

pregnancies.description: Track pregnancies, diagnostics, due dates and expected births.

litters.description: Manage litters, births, follow-up and related documents.

puppies.description: Track puppies, statuses, bookings and departures.

sales.description: Manage sales, contracts, transfer certificates, invoices and documents.

profitability.description: Analyze costs, revenue and margins by litter.

genetics.description: Analyze lines, breeding stock and selection direction.

strategy.description: Evaluate mating plans through genetics, risks and selection goals.

breeder.description: Manage kennel identity and professional information.

website.description: Configure your public website and online presence.

settings.description: Configure appearance, language and application preferences.

settings.subtitle: Configure your professional identity, appearance and workspace language.
